creator: wxs@atarininja.org
text:
On Wed, Jan 03, 2007 at 05:34:17PM +0100, Daniel Roethlisberger wrote:
 > Can you try the patch from:
 > 
 > http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/107478
 > 
 > and let me know how it goes?  Thanks.
 
 I just tested this patch on 6.1 and it works.  I do not have the time to
 try it out in a tinderbox for 5-STABLE or -CURRENT but it should work
 there too.
 
 Thanks Daniel for your fast response.
 
 -- WXS
